commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR hardens YouTube view-count collection and fallback merging, adds one-hour metric freshness and embedded transcript-cache identity checks, expands regression coverage, and adds a dependency stabilization rule.

Reproducibility: yes. Use fresh cached same-video metrics with `viewCount: null` and HTML whose player response also has `viewCount: null`; the source predicate necessarily enters the refresh path.
commands.review_followup: - A narrow predicate and regression-test change can make this PR honor its stated one-hour freshness contract without a product decision.

target.title: [codex] Harden YouTube transcript view metrics
target.body:
## Context

Follow-up to #262, which was merged prematurely on June 11, 2026 at `61c793c7` with a failed test check. This PR preserves the shipped CLI/output contract while correcting and hardening YouTube view-count collection, freshness, fallback, and cache behavior.

## Changes

- Validate and merge YouTube view metrics across embedded player data, the player API, watch-page metadata, and yt-dlp fallbacks.
- Preserve a known view count when a later fallback supplies duration only or observes an unavailable count.
- Keep hidden/unavailable counts explicit as `null` in JSON and `YouTube views: unavailable` in human output.
- Reuse fresh metrics for one hour, including stable `observedAt`, while refreshing stale or incomplete observations within the existing best-effort timeout.
- Verify embedded YouTube transcript-cache identity using the stored resource key, preventing stale transcripts after an embed changes without discarding valid legacy cache entries.
- Add the repository rule requiring stable dependency releases to age seven days before adoption; prereleases remain excluded unless already adopted.

Network behavior remains YouTube-specific and best-effort. Cached observations avoid repeat metadata requests; failures do not block transcript extraction.

## Validation

- `pnpm -s check`: 438 files passed, 28 skipped; 2,349 tests passed, 42 skipped.
- `pnpm -s build`: passed.
- CI pack assertions: root CLI, core ESM entrypoints, prompts, ffmpeg/ffprobe WASM, and LGPL artifact all present.
- `$autoreview`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings.
- Built `dist/cli.js`, public `dQw4w9WgXcQ`: `1,781,897,219` views, exactly matching yt-dlp at observation time.
- Repeated public extraction preserved the same count and `observedAt`, proving fresh-cache reuse.
- Built `dist/cli.js`, unavailable/private `wBwJ7ETeRdE`: JSON `viewCount: null`; human output `YouTube views: unavailable`.

Source contracts checked against the [YouTube videos API](https://developers.google.com/youtube/v3/docs/videos), [YouTube API revision history](https://developers.google.com/youtube/v3/revision_history), and [yt-dlp](https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp).
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
